meta.title: DJ Murti — Events & Entertainment in Limburg
meta.description: Professional DJ service for weddings, birthdays and events in Limburg and beyond. Persian, German & International music.

hero.headline: Your DJ for unforgettable nights
hero.subline: Weddings · Birthdays · Persian Celebrations · Club Nights — in Limburg and wherever the music plays.

about.title: About DJ Murti
about.text: Music connects cultures. As a DJ, I bring together Persian beats, German party classics and international hits — for events nobody forgets.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From intimate to epic — always the right sound.

wedding.title: Weddings
wedding.description: The most important day of your life deserves the perfect soundtrack. From the ceremony to the last hour on the dance floor.

birthday.title: Birthdays & Celebrations
birthday.description: Whether 18th or 50th — I make sure your guests never stop dancing.

club.title: Club Nights & Parties
club.description: Persian nights, Latin vibes or mainstream — I read the crowd and deliver the beat.

corporate.title: Persian Celebrations
corporate.description: Nowruz, Yalda or family gatherings — I know the music, the traditions and I'll get your community dancing.

booking.title: Book Your Event
booking.subtitle: Pick a free slot for a no-obligation consultation.
booking.comingSoonText: In the meantime, drop me a message via the contact form — I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your event — I'll take care of the rest.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
